articles.title: Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star
articles.description: Aldon Smith had an estimated net worth of $5 million when he died on June 13, 2026. The former San Francisco 49ers star earned more than $19.5 million during his NFL career. Known for his dominant pass-rushing ability, Smith reached great heights early in football but faced several setbacks off the field. Even after retirement, he spent time mentoring young athletes and sharing lessons from his own journey.

articles.title: Iran war 'has been a strategic disaster for the State of Israel', analyst says
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is on a collision course with Donald Trump as the U.S. president seeks to extricate himself from the war, with both men's goals unmet and Israeli military operations tied down in Lebanon. Speaking with FRANCE 24's Sharon Gaffney, Aaron David Miller, Senior Fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, says that "this has been a strategic disaster for the state of Israel. All of Benjamin Netanyahu's war aims - diminished support for proxies, restrictions on ballistic missiles, overthrow of the regime, or weakening of the regime - none of this has occurred."

articles.title: Axis Max Life Achieves Highest-Ever Claims Paid Ratio of 99.8%* in FY26
articles.description: New Delhi [India], June 15: Axis Max Life Insurance Ltd. formerly known as Max Life Insurance Company Ltd ("Axis Max Life"/ "Company"), has settled 20,529 individual death claims worth ₹1641 Cr. in FY 2025-26, achieving its highest-ever individual death claims paid ratio of 99.8%*. This marks a consistent rise from 99.34% in FY21-22, reinforcing 99.8%* as the Company's new benchmark for trust -- India Ke Bharose Ka NumberTM+. Since its inception, Axis Max Life has paid a total of ₹11,772.21 Crores towards death claims on 2,43,524 policies.

articles.title: Punjab Elections Could Be Held In November This Year, Claims Kejriwal Amid Early Poll Buzz
articles.description: AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal has claimed that Punjab Assembly elections may be advanced to November 2026 instead of being held in February 2027 as scheduled. Kejriwal said he had received information suggesting that the poll schedule could be brought forward, sparking fresh political speculation in the state. The claim comes amid reports that major political parties, including AAP, Congress and BJP, have already begun preparations for a possible early election. While no official announcement has been made, the buzz around advancing the Punjab polls has intensified political activity across the state.

articles.title: ByteDance in talks with China's Iluvatar CoreX to purchase AI chips
articles.description: ByteDance, the influential technology entity known for its innovative platforms, is reportedly in discussions to acquire AI chip technology from Iluvatar CoreX and Baidu. This strategic move is largely focused on securing in-house chip supplies essential for running complex inference tasks. Should this partnership materialize, Iluvatar CoreX may join the ranks as ByteDance's third key GPU vendor.
